meta.title: Is Britain Still a Global Intelligence Power?
meta.description: Is Britain still a global intelligence power? What are emerging threats Britain and America need to focus on? How is the global map of threats and opportunities changing? Sir John Sawers will offer his perspective on Britain’s impact and role from his unique perspective. Hudson Research Fellow Ben Judah will moderate the conversation.
